## Improvements

- Keep tab switching predictable by separating immediate navigation activation from later async load completions.
- Refactor the main EasyCopy screen into focused reader, standard-mode, state, and widget parts to make follow-up changes safer.
- Add a shared mounted-safe state update helper for async UI work triggered during page loading and reader updates.

## Fixes

- Fix cached hits, profile refreshes, and background revalidation occasionally switching back to a tab after the user had already moved elsewhere.
- Fix async page-load results reactivating cross-tab targets even when those tabs were no longer selected.

## Packaging

- Bump the app version to `1.4.0+5`.
- Add regression coverage for the tab activation policy used by navigation requests and async load results.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/huangusaki/EasyCopy/compare/v1.3.0...v1.4.0
